name: multilabel-classification
title: Multilabel Classification with XGBoost (Done Right)
description: Build a production-ready multilabel classifier on tabular data using XGBoost wrapped in MultiOutputClassifier. Covers per-label metrics, hamming loss vs subset accuracy, label co-occurrence analysis, the four F1 averaging strategies, MultiOutputClassifier vs ClassifierChain, and per-label SHAP. Includes a self-contained marimo notebook walkthrough.
